name: user-notification
description: Send notifications to users based on events
businessLogic: Validate user exists and has valid contact info
Determine notification channel based on user preferences
Generate notification content using event-specific template
Apply personalization based on user data and metadata
Track delivery status and update user activity log
Schedule follow-up if needed based on event type
errorHandling: Retry failed deliveries up to 3 times with exponential backoff
Fall back to alternative channels if primary fails
Log all failures to monitoring system
Dead letter queue for permanent failures
